architectures.description: 适合工具类网页，数据存浏览器本地，无需登录
agents_md_rules: **NEVER** introduce Redux, MobX, Zustand, or any global state library — use React Context for shared state, useState for local
**NEVER** add CSS-in-JS libraries (styled-components, emotion) — use Tailwind utility classes only
**NEVER** install UI component libraries (MUI, Ant Design, Chakra) without explicit user request — build with Tailwind
**NEVER** persist data to localStorage directly — use Dexie (IndexedDB) for all data storage
**NEVER** make HTTP requests to a backend — this is a frontend-only app
**ALWAYS** use functional components with hooks, never class components
**ALWAYS** colocate component files: Button.tsx + Button.test.tsx + Button.module.css in src/components/Button/
agents_md_done_criteria: No new dependencies added without justification in commit message
next_steps_hints: 运行 `npm run dev` 启动开发服务器
对 AI 说：'读 AGENTS.md，按里面的架构开始做'
数据库表结构在 src/db.ts，按需扩展

architectures.display_name: 全栈应用（需登录/云数据库）
architectures.description: 适合需要用户系统、多设备同步、协作的应用
agents_md_rules: **NEVER** hardcode Supabase URL or anon key — use `process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_*`
**NEVER** expose Supabase service role key to client code — server actions / route handlers only
**NEVER** skip Row Level Security (RLS) — every new table MUST have RLS policies
**NEVER** use `useEffect` for data fetching — use Server Components or `use()` hook
**NEVER** use `pages/` directory — App Router only
**NEVER** install `next-auth` or other auth libraries — Supabase Auth handles it
**ALWAYS** add migrations to `supabase/migrations/` with timestamp prefix
**ALWAYS** ask user before changing database schema
**ALWAYS** use Server Components by default, only mark 'use client' when needed
agents_md_done_criteria: RLS policies defined for any new tables
No service role key in client code
Auth flow tested manually (since Supabase needs real session)
next_steps_hints: 复制 `.env.local.example` 为 `.env.local` 并填入 Supabase 凭证
对 AI 说：'读 AGENTS.md，先设计数据库 schema'

architectures.description: Chrome/Edge/Firefox 通用扩展，可注入网页
architectures.test_command: echo 'No tests yet (browser ext testing is hard)'
agents_md_rules: **NEVER** use `chrome.*` API directly — use Plasmo's storage/messaging APIs for cross-browser
**NEVER** request more permissions than absolutely needed in manifest
**NEVER** inject scripts into all URLs (`<all_urls>`) — scope to specific domains
**NEVER** make external network requests without explaining why to user
**NEVER** modify the page DOM destructively — use Shadow DOM for injected UI
**ALWAYS** ask before adding host permissions
**ALWAYS** test on at least Chrome before claiming done
**ALWAYS** version manifest properly in package.json
agents_md_done_criteria: Extension can be loaded in Chrome (chrome://extensions, Load unpacked → build/chrome-mv3-dev)
Tested on at least one real target page
next_steps_hints: 运行 `pnpm dev` 启动热重载
在 Chrome 打开 chrome://extensions，加载 build/chrome-mv3-dev
对 AI 说：'读 AGENTS.md，开始做扩展功能'

architectures.display_name: Python AI 脚本 / 数据处理
architectures.description: 适合 LLM 应用、数据清洗、爬虫、自动化脚本
examples: 用 GPT 整理我的笔记
批量处理 CSV 数据
agents_md_rules: **NEVER** use `pip install` directly — always use `uv add <package>`
**NEVER** activate venv manually — `uv run` handles it
**NEVER** hardcode API keys — use `os.environ.get('OPENAI_API_KEY')` with python-dotenv
**NEVER** use `requests` library — use `httpx` (modern, async-ready)
**NEVER** use bare `print()` for logs — use `logging` or `rich.print`
**NEVER** ignore type hints — all functions need return types
**ALWAYS** validate LLM outputs with pydantic models
**ALWAYS** use `uv run ruff format` before commit
**ALWAYS** handle OpenAI errors (RateLimitError, APIError) explicitly
agents_md_done_criteria: Type check passes: `uv run python -c 'import main'`
next_steps_hints: 复制 `.env.example` 为 `.env` 并填入 API key
运行 `uv run python main.py` 测试
对 AI 说：'读 AGENTS.md，按里面的规范开始做'

architectures.description: 适合开发者工具、自动化脚本、CLI 应用

init_steps.cmd: npm install commander chalk ora inquirer fs-extra

agents_md_rules: **NEVER** use CommonJS `require()` — ESM `import` only (package.json type: module)
**NEVER** use `process.argv` directly — use commander for arg parsing
**NEVER** use `console.log` for user-facing output — use chalk for color
**NEVER** swallow errors silently — always show user-friendly message
**ALWAYS** write tests with vitest for any command logic
**ALWAYS** add a Spinner (ora) for any operation > 500ms
**ALWAYS** use absolute paths via `path.resolve()` — never assume cwd
agents_md_done_criteria: Help output is clear and well-formatted
next_steps_hints: 运行 `npm run dev -- --help` 测试 CLI
对 AI 说：'读 AGENTS.md，开始实现核心命令'

fallback.description: 无匹配架构时的兜底，仅生成规则文件 + git，不跑脚手架
agents_md_rules: **NEVER** commit `.env` or any file with secrets
**NEVER** add dependencies without explaining why in commit message
agents_md_done_criteria: Code change is minimal and focused
next_steps_hints: 这是通用骨架，没有特定脚手架
对 AI 说：'读 AGENTS.md，帮我搭建项目结构'
